name: Olivia Shae & Jocelyn Klein
text: Working with Pooja to find a home was a delightful experience. As first time home buyers, having someone who took the time to get to know us and found out not just what our needs were, but our dreams for the future too, made all the difference. Pooja is a very passionate, dedicated, and knowledgeable realtor; without her help I don't think we would've found such an amazing home. She worked relentlessly to help ensure this was a positive experience. Even when things got stressful or weren't going the way we hoped, she stayed positive and reminded us to let the universe guide us. Pooja's hard work and love for what she does lead us to the perfect place to call home and we cannot thank her enough!
